items.title: Four killed in second Turkish school shooting in two days
items.dek: There has been no official confirmation of who has been killed or what has happened to the attacker.
items.body: There has been no official confirmation of who has been killed or what has happened to the attacker.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Trump's rift with Pope is playing out in public - it's costing him valuable support
items.dek: Leading conservative Catholics tell the BBC why they back the American pontiff in his spat with Trump.
items.body: Leading conservative Catholics tell the BBC why they back the American pontiff in his spat with Trump.

items.title: Trump warns that UK trade deal 'can always be changed'
items.dek: The US president says he gave the UK a "better" deal than he had to in an interview on Wednesday.
items.body: The US president says he gave the UK a "better" deal than he had to in an interview on Wednesday.
